files.data:
# Showcase assets

- `images/cover.svg` and `images/path.svg` are original project artwork released under CC0-1.0.
- `audio/t-rex-roar.mp3` is the [MDN CC0 audio example](https://interactive-examples.mdn.mozilla.net/media/cc0-audio/t-rex-roar.mp3).
- `video/flower.mp4` is the [MDN CC0 video example](https://interactive-examples.mdn.mozilla.net/media/cc0-videos/flower.mp4).

The media files are stored locally so the compiled showcase remains playable offline.

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 500" role="img" aria-label="MCF showcase cover"><defs><linearGradient id="g" x2="1" y2="1"><stop stop-color="#176b87"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#29a37a"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="800" height="500" rx="40" fill="url(#g)"/><circle cx="180" cy="250" r="90" fill="#fff" opacity=".2"/><path d="M130 250h100M180 200v100" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/><text x="310" y="235" fill="#fff" font-family="system-ui" font-size="70" font-weight="800">MCF 1.0</text><text x="315" y="295" fill="#dff" font-family="system-ui" font-size="30">Showcase course</text></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 700 260" role="img" aria-label="Three steps connected by a path"><rect width="700" height="260" rx="24" fill="#eef8f8"/><path d="M100 130h500" stroke="#8bcbbb" stroke-width="12" stroke-linecap="round"/><g fill="#176b87"><circle cx="100" cy="130" r="45"/><circle cx="350" cy="130" r="45"/><circle cx="600" cy="130" r="45"/></g><g fill="white" font-family="system-ui" font-size="30" text-anchor="middle"><text x="100" y="141">1</text><text x="350" y="141">2</text><text x="600" y="141">3</text></g></svg>

id: foundations
title: 'Foundations'
description: 'Rich content and interaction'
lessons:
  - lessons/01-rich-content.mcf
  - lessons/02-questions.mcf

mcf: '1.0'
id: mcf-showcase
title: 'MCF 1.0 Showcase'
language: en
description: 'A tour of every MCF 1.0 activity and question type.'
authors: ['MCF Project']
license: CC0-1.0
version: '1.0.0'
cover: assets/images/cover.svg
chapters:
  - source: chapters/foundations
